news.title:
KPIT Tech transferred a 26% stake in N-Dream to its UK subsidiary.
N-Dream is now a step-down subsidiary, with KPIT retaining 90% group ownership.
news.summary:
KPIT Tech transferred a 26% stake in N-Dream to its UK subsidiary.
N-Dream is now a step-down subsidiary, with KPIT retaining 90% group ownership.

news.title:
Nifty IT index plunged 21% in February, eroding LIC and mutual fund IT holdings by 20%, losing ₹81,000 crore and ₹45,000 crore respectively.
Infosys, TCS, HCL, and mid-tier IT firms like Coforge and KPIT dropped sharply on AI fears, with HSBC forecasting 14-16% sector revenue deflation.
news.summary:
Nifty IT index plunged 21% in February, eroding LIC and mutual fund IT holdings by 20%, losing ₹81,000 crore and ₹45,000 crore respectively.
Infosys, TCS, HCL, and mid-tier IT firms like Coforge and KPIT dropped sharply on AI fears, with HSBC forecasting 14-16% sector revenue deflation.

news.title:
KPIT Technologies interacted with major investors during 'Chasing Growth 2026' conference in Mumbai.
No unpublished price-sensitive information was shared; updates reiterated from Jan 30, 2026 earnings call.
news.summary:
KPIT Technologies interacted with major investors during 'Chasing Growth 2026' conference in Mumbai.
No unpublished price-sensitive information was shared; updates reiterated from Jan 30, 2026 earnings call.

news.title:
DIIs hold over 20% in stocks like KPIT Technologies and KNR Constructions, signaling strong institutional confidence.
KPIT saw 9% YoY revenue growth but 30% net profit drop, while KNR's revenue fell 12% YoY with a 58% profit decline.
news.summary:
DIIs hold over 20% in stocks like KPIT Technologies and KNR Constructions, signaling strong institutional confidence.
KPIT saw 9% YoY revenue growth but 30% net profit drop, while KNR's revenue fell 12% YoY with a 58% profit decline.

news.summary: Goldman Sachs reduces target price for KPIT Technologies to 940.

The stock underperformed its sector and market due to financial challenges.

news.title:
KPIT Tech reported 9.4% YoY INR growth, 1.5% CC growth in Q3 FY26.
Fixed price revenue mix rose to 66%, AI focus, INR 9B cash, dividend declared.
news.summary:
KPIT Tech reported 9.4% YoY INR growth, 1.5% CC growth in Q3 FY26.
Fixed price revenue mix rose to 66%, AI focus, INR 9B cash, dividend declared.

No unpublished price-sensitive information will be shared; past Q3 FY26 data to be reiterated.

news.title:
KPIT Technologies' promoters seek reclassification to Public for 0.82% stake.
Application submitted to BSE and NSE on Feb 2, 2026; details on website.
news.summary:

news.title:
KPIT Technologies sets FY27 target with $202M in new deals.
The company aims for 3.0% YoY revenue growth by FY27.
news.summary:
KPIT Technologies sets FY27 target with $202M in new deals.
The company aims for 3.0% YoY revenue growth by FY27.

news.title:
L&T's IT units, LTIMindtree and LTTS, are set to miss their growth targets for 2026 due to economic uncertainties, leadership churn, and a slow merger process.
While L&T's overall revenue may exceed targets, its IT divisions lag behind peers like KPIT and Tata Elxsi, with slower growth in key sectors like automotive.
news.summary:
L&T's IT units, LTIMindtree and LTTS, are set to miss their growth targets for 2026 due to economic uncertainties, leadership churn, and a slow merger process.
While L&T's overall revenue may exceed targets, its IT divisions lag behind peers like KPIT and Tata Elxsi, with slower growth in key sectors like automotive.

news.title:
KPIT Technologies shares decline due to negative organic growth.
Margins are lower compared to the previous year, impacting sentiment.
news.summary:
KPIT Technologies shares decline due to negative organic growth.

KPIT Technologies reports Q3 consolidated net profit of ₹1.33 billion.
The company's consolidated revenue from operations stood at ₹16.17 billion.

news.title:
KPIT Technologies' board meeting on Jan 29, 2026, will consider interim dividend and approve Q3 FY26 results.
The meeting will also review unaudited financials and the Limited Review Report for the period ended Dec 31, 2025.
news.summary:
KPIT Technologies' board meeting on Jan 29, 2026, will consider interim dividend and approve Q3 FY26 results.
The meeting will also review unaudited financials and the Limited Review Report for the period ended Dec 31, 2025.

news.title:
KPIT Technologies' board meeting is scheduled for Jan 29, 2026 to review unaudited financial results for Q3 and 9 months ending Dec 31, 2025.
Trading window closure began Jan 1, 2026, and ends 48 hours post-results declaration.
news.summary:
KPIT Technologies' board meeting is scheduled for Jan 29, 2026 to review unaudited financial results for Q3 and 9 months ending Dec 31, 2025.
Trading window closure began Jan 1, 2026, and ends 48 hours post-results declaration.

news.title:
KPIT Technologies delivered an 856% share price growth over 5 years, with a 58% CAGR.
Despite long-term gains, the stock fell 23% in the last year, including dividends.
